string.text: List of tasks: \ n 1. Kill a stalker. \ n 2. Kill bloodsucker. \ n 3. Kill a wild boar. \ N 4. Kill the traitor.
List of tasks: \ n 1. Kill Kontroller. \ n 2. Inspect the caches. \ n 3. Get the documents. \ N 4. Kill the bandit.
It is necessary to find the disappeared stalker, whom his comrades have been looking for a long time. Nickname: Brum.
Missing friend: Find a stalker
It is necessary to kill one "special" bloodsucker, which constantly commits night attacks on the camp.
Bloody nightmare: Kill a mutant
It is necessary to kill a seasoned wild boar, which occasionally attacks the camp.
Another hunt: kill a wild boar
You need to find and kill the traitor.
Vulture: Kill the bandit
It is necessary to find and kill a mercenary who set up "honest" people.
Other people's debts: kill the mercenary
It is necessary to kill three bandits who passed themselves down for stalkers and betrayed the whole camp.
Three brothers: kill stalkers
It is necessary to eliminate the poltergeists.
Mutants: Destroy the Poltergeists
It is necessary to eliminate bloodsuckers.
Mutants: destroy bloodsuckers
It is necessary to eliminate the psi-pseudo.
Mutants: Kill the Psi
It is necessary to eliminate the Kontroller.
Mutants: Destroy the Kontroller
It is necessary to eliminate the pseudo -giant.
Wild Hunt: Kill the Pseudo-Giant
It is necessary to eliminate the Burer.
Wild Hunt: Kill the Burer
It is necessary to eliminate the chimera.
Wild Hunt: Kill the Chimera
It is necessary to eliminate mutants who have filled the indicated area.
Wild hunt: kill mutants
